title: 最高難易度オペレーション

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Foodie
text_block_list.text:
The dessert buffet yesterday was so yummy! I'm
supercharged with energy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
U-um... is Bourbon looking at us? Do you think
she's mad? Were we too loud?

text_block_list.name: Shy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Did you feel that bass?! Is this the error
sound that plays whenever Bourbon gets angry?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Foodie
text_block_list.text:
Eeep! We're sorry! We were being too rowdy!
We'll go for a run to burn off this energy!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I want you to tell me about this method of
energy rechar—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...They're gone. Beginning analysis of the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Misunderstandings regarding my facial expression
and abdominal sounds caused subjects to flee.
High crowd density will make pursuit... difficult.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I conclude that communication remains the most
difficult operation for me to execute...
